capabilities.name: generateAttractionGuide
capabilities.description: Creates a warm Chinese historical and cultural guide for a UK attraction, tailored for a family visit.

visitor_context.description: Optional family needs, child ages, interests, and visit timing.

guide_text.description: Family-friendly historical and cultural attraction guide in the requested language.

capabilities.name: generateChineseAudioGuide
capabilities.description: Generates a Chinese audio guide from approved attraction-guide text.

voice_hint.description: Optional voice preference for a calm, family-friendly narration.

audio_url.description: URL of the generated Chinese audio guide.

capabilities.name: generateFamilyItinerary
capabilities.description: Creates a family-friendly multi-day UK itinerary with clear disruption alternatives and reasons in Chinese.

trip_brief.description: Arrival, departure, destinations, family composition, preferences, and any travel constraints.

weather_context.description: Optional current or forecast weather context supplied by the application.

itinerary_plan.description: A structured multi-day itinerary in the requested language, including family pacing and disruption alternatives with reasons.

capabilities.name: translateTravelImage
capabilities.description: Reads English text in a travel image and returns a Chinese translation with an annotated image when supported.

source_image_url.description: Accessible URL of a menu, road sign, or exhibit image.

translation_context.description: Optional context such as menu, road sign, or exhibit.

target_language.description: Target translation language, normally Simplified Chinese.

translated_text.description: Chinese translation of the detected English text, written in the target language.

annotated_image_url.description: URL of an image annotated with the translated text when supported.
